meaning: n.骑马奔驰的人,飞驰的马,旋转木马
examples: Artist's conception of one of the crocodiles, which had a soft, dog-like nose and was an agile galloper.
Artist's conception of one of the crocodiles, which had a soft, dog-like nose and was an agile galloper. Photograph: Todd Marshall/National Geographic
The first generation Pajero was also marketed as the Hyundai Galloper in South Korea, Europe and GCC Countries, while the second generation was in production elsewhere.
